title: Add Blaze Prep to learn
author: pollinations-ai[bot]
pr_body_excerpt:
- Adds [Blaze Prep](https://blazeprep.net) to learn
- Manage FDNY Prep learning content in Blaze Prep, with AI-generated materials from Pollinations AI.

Fixes #11689

gist.headline: Study sparks, no smoke
gist.blurb: Blaze Prep has joined the learning garden. FDNY Prep study material can now grow from a prompt, with Pollinations AI helping keep the practice pile well stocked.
gist.summary: Added Blaze Prep to the Pollinations learn directory, highlighting its FDNY Prep learning-content workflow with AI-generated study materials from Pollinations AI.
gist.impact: Learners and builders can now discover Blaze Prep as a Pollinations-powered tool for creating FDNY Prep practice materials.
gist.visual_concept: Depict Blaze Prep as a cozy firefighter-study station rather than an emergency scene: a retro terminal produces friendly flashcards, a small firefighter helmet rests beside textbooks, and code-plants sprout from a nearby pot. Polly, wearing a tiny firefighter helmet and carrying a pencil, helps organize the AI-generated study cards; warm flames are represented only as gentle orange lamp-like glow, with lime green prominently used on the terminal and garden details.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of Polly, a cute bee mascot with a yellow body, dark brown horizontal stripes, small black legs, two black antennae, black vertical oval eyes, bright pink rectangular cheek blushes, a small happy smile, and rounded light blue translucent wings, wearing a tiny firefighter helmet and sorting AI-generated study flashcards beside a retro terminal glowing lime green (#ecf874); textbooks, a small helmet, and code-plants in flower pots make a warm Blaze Prep learning nook. Cozy 8-bit pixel art aesthetic, soft pastel gradients, warm lighting, retro gaming vibes like Stardew Valley or A Short Hike, with subtle pixel-font text reading “BLAZE PREP,” nostalgic but beautiful and emotionally warm.

image.prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of Polly, a cute bee mascot with a yellow body, dark brown horizontal stripes, small black legs, two black antennae, black vertical oval eyes, bright pink rectangular cheek blushes, a small happy smile, and rounded light blue translucent wings, wearing a tiny firefighter helmet and sorting AI-generated study flashcards beside a retro terminal glowing lime green (#ecf874); textbooks, a small helmet, and code-plants in flower pots make a warm Blaze Prep learning nook. Cozy 8-bit pixel art aesthetic, soft pastel gradients, warm lighting, retro gaming vibes like Stardew Valley or A Short Hike, with subtle pixel-font text reading “BLAZE PREP,” nostalgic but beautiful and emotionally warm.
